section_header: Table of laws and measures (2001-04-24 Ministerial Decree - quantitative objectives for increasing energy efficiency uses)
extraction_rationale: Sets national quantitative objectives and implementation control procedures for distribution companies (clear policy mechanism).

policy_statement: Ministerial Decree (25 July 2001) defines financing criteria for municipalities participating in 'Ecological Days 2001' for awareness campaigns, opinion polls, citizen knowledge initiatives on sustainable mobility, and more efficient organization of the days.
verbatim_text: The 'Ecological Days 2001' campaign. ... Criteria for the financing to the - ities participating... - campaigns to increase awareness provide information to the general public; - opinion polls before, during and after... - initiatives directly designed to knowledge among citizens of the prob - lems of sustainable mobility; - initiatives directly geared to a more - cient organisation of the 'Ecological Days'.
section_header: Table of laws and measures (2001-07-25 Ministerial Decree The 'Ecological Days 2001' campaign)
extraction_rationale: Specifies funded activity types and conditions for municipal participation in a named campaign.

policy_statement: Ministerial Decree (3 October 2001) generally prohibits the use of halons except for specifically indicated cases, in line with agreements to protect the ozone layer.
verbatim_text: Recovery, recycling, regeneration and - tribution of halons. ... generically - hibits the use of halons, apart cases specifically indicated.
section_header: Table of laws and measures (2001-10-03 Ministerial Decree Recovery, recycling, regeneration and distribution of halons)
extraction_rationale: Contains a clear prohibition (regulatory mechanism) with limited exceptions.

policy_statement: Law 82/2002 stipulates rules and regulations reducing polluting emissions from production plants that use petroleum coke in combustion plants.
verbatim_text: Conversion into Law... containing urgent measures for the rules and regulations on the use of petroleum coke in combustion plants. Stipulates the rules and regulations reducing polluting emissions from produc - tion plants that utilise petroleum
section_header: Table of laws and measures (2002-05-06 Law 82)
extraction_rationale: Explicit regulatory rules aimed at reducing emissions from petroleum coke use.

policy_statement: Law 120/2002 (Kyoto Protocol ratification) binds the Environment Ministry, in agreement with the Finance Ministry and other ministries, to present by 30 September 2002 a national action plan to reduce greenhouse-gas emissions and increase absorption capacity, including a report on implementation and revisions to CIPE Resolution of 19 November 1998.
verbatim_text: In addition to the ratification of Protocol, it also includes a series - tions aimed at achieving the objectives greenhouse-gas emission reduction. MATT, in agreement with MEF and other ministries involved, is bound to present the Interministerial Committee Economic Planning, within 30 September 2002, a national action plan aimed reducing greenhouse-gas emissions increasing their absorption capacity, report comprising the state of execution, the revision proposal to resolution 19 November 1998
section_header: Table of laws and measures (2002-06-01 Law 120)
extraction_rationale: Binding legal requirement with a deadline and specified content for a national action plan; although a related item exists in prior summary (I8), this text contains the same commitment—however it is central and explicitly stated here, so extracted as grounded in this chunk.

policy_statement: A national plan to reduce greenhouse-gas emissions targets a reduction of 93 million tonnes by 2008–2012 and identifies interventions across energy, agriculture/forestry sinks, transport, and cooperation, with financing via fuel excise tax re-modulation, use of an emissions-reduction/energy-efficiency fund, and revenues from energy-sector reform.
verbatim_text: National plan to reduce greenhouse-gas emissions ... Reduction of 93 million tonnes of emissions by 2008-2012. Identifies modalities of intervention to comply the emission reduction objectives... The financing of the plan will focus on three main interventions: a)Internal re-modulation of excise taxes on fuels... b)Utilization of the 'Fund for reducing atmospheric emissions and promoting energy efficiency... c)Use of revenues generated by the appli - cation of art. 21 of the Reformation decree for the energy sector
section_header: Table of laws and measures (2002-10-08 National plan to reduce greenhouse-gas emissions)
extraction_rationale: Contains a quantified target (93 Mt by 2008–2012) and describes financing instruments and intervention modalities.
